items.name: ryzen-ai-documentation
items.description: Onboarding documentation source for the AMD Ryzen™ AI Software Platform.   The AMD Ryzen™ AI Software Platform enables developers to take pretrained machine learning models in popular frameworks and run them on laptops powered by AMD Ryzen™ AI technology.

items.name: predicting_fashion_biodegradability
items.description: A machine learning framework designed to predict the biodegradability of textile materials based on fiber composition.

items.name: quantum
items.description: An open-source Python framework for hybrid quantum-classical machine learning.

items.name: sagemaker-distribution
items.description: A set of Docker images that include popular frameworks for machine learning, data science and visualization.

items.name: quantum-graph-research
items.description: Investigating the mathematical bridge between classical graph theory and quantum circuit software design, with applications to quantum machine learning frameworks.

items.name: Decoding-Attrition-A-Data-Driven-Revenue-Risk-Customer-Retention-Intelligence-Framework
items.description: This project delivers a complete, end-to-end churn intelligence system from raw CSV files to an interactive Power BI dashboard and a machine learning prediction model, using a SQL first, analytics engineering approach.

items.name: ML-From-Scratch
items.description: End-to-end Machine Learning algorithms implemented from scratch using only Python and NumPy. Focused on understanding the underlying mathematics and linear algebra without high-level frameworks.

items.name: Aircraft-Engine-Prognostics-and-Maintenance-Queue-Simulation
items.description: This project develops a predictive maintenance framework for aircraft turbofan engines using NASA's C-MAPSS dataset. It combines machine learning (LightGBM) for Remaining Useful Life (RUL) prediction with discrete-event simulation (SimPy) to model the impact of maintenance queue delays on engine fleet health.

items.name: Traffic-Prediction
items.description: Traffic prediction using deep learning represents a significant advancement in intelligent transportation systems. This paper presents a comprehensive framework for developing a Traffic Prediction Application that combines state-of-the-art machine learning models with practical web application implementation.

items.name: matbench-discovery
items.description: An evaluation framework for machine learning models simulating high-throughput materials discovery.

items.name: django-drf-ml-learning
items.description: A full-stack learning journey combining Django REST Framework, React.js, and Machine Learning. Includes DRF practice APIs and a complete stock prediction portal using LSTM, data analysis, and real-world integration.

items.name: Drift_Scope
items.description: An Explainable Visual Analytics Framework for Detecting and Explaining Concept Drift in Production Machine Learning Systems

items.name: AutoFair
items.description: AutoFAIR is a model-agnostic framework for automated bias detection and adaptive fairness mitigation in machine learning systems.

items.name: tradingsystem
items.description: Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.

items.name: Cloud-Engineering-Automated-MLOps-Pipeline-with-Drift-Bias-Detection-
items.description: This repository contains an industry-grade, end-to-end MLOps framework built on AWS. The project addresses the "silent killers" of production machine learning: Model Drift and Algorithmic Bias.

items.name: fake-.job-detection.
items.description: Flask-based Fake Job Detection System.This project aims to develop an intelligent framework that analyzes job postings and identifies potential fraud using machine learning, natural language processing (NLP), and pattern-based classification techniques.

items.name: finstream-metaopt
items.description: Implementation of an adaptive machine learning system for non-stationary financial data streams. The framework combines temporally diverse ensemble models with meta-heuristic optimization to dynamically adjust model influence under concept drift.

items.name: ML-Based-Network-IDS
items.description: An Network Intrusion Detection Framework using Machine Learning Approach

items.name: quantum-neural-architecture
items.description: An experiment to work with quantum machine learning framework with Variational Quantum Circuits(VQC) as a tunable circuit.

items.name: AdrielJoseph25
items.description: AI/ML and Data Science student passionate about building intelligent, scalable solutions. Skilled in Python, C++, Java, and modern frameworks, with strong foundations in algorithms and systems. Interested in machine learning, NLP, and generative AI, combining creativity with problem solving for real-world impact.

items.name: live-dashboard
items.description: The dashboard consolidates all analytical components into a single visual interface, making the system accessible and interpretable for researchers, policymakers, and agricultural stakeholders. Overall, the proposed framework demonstrates how machine learning, statistical risk modeling, causal analysis.

items.name: freight-rail-delay-prediction
items.description: This project investigates short-term arrival delay time prediction in freight rail operations using historical operational datasets and machine learning models. The framework captures delay propagation patterns to enhance prediction accuracy, improve operational efficiency, and assist decision-making in freight rail network management.

items.name: tensorflow-federated
items.description: An open-source framework for machine learning and other computations on decentralized data.

items.name: Banking_Fd
items.description: Transaction data is analyzed to identify abnormal patterns linked to fraudulent activity.  Machine learning models are used to accurately classify transactions and adapt to new fraud patterns.  The framework supports early detection and improves the security and reliability of financial transactions.

items.name: quantum-ml-library
items.description: A Julia-based library for quantum machine learning research and development, integrating with quantum computing frameworks.

items.name: Intrusion_Detection_System
items.description: Titlename:Hybrid Machine Learning and Deep Learning Framework for Real-Time Intrusion Detection with Explainable AI

items.name: AlloyDesign-ML
items.description: Repository for the aticle: "Machine learning couples precipitation strengthening and transformation-induced plasticity". Contains the framework for physics-informed alloy design and property prediction.

items.name: machinelearning
items.description: ML.NET is an open source and cross-platform machine learning framework for .NET.

items.name: CreditCardFraudDetection
items.description: This project delivers a unified, data-driven framework for credit card fraud detection and credit scoring, engineered to empower financial institutions with high-precision risk intelligence. The solution operationalizes advanced machine learning pipelines—spanning LightGBM, XGBoost, CatBoost, Random Forests, and Neural Networks

items.name: IntrusionDetectionSystem
items.description: A Titlename:Hybrid Machine Learning and Deep Learning Framework for Real-Time Intrusion Detection with Explainable AI

items.name: Ensemble-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Detection-and-Classification-of-Obfuscated-Malware-
items.description: Developed an ensemble machine learning framework for detecting and classifying obfuscated malware using the CIC-MalMem-2022 dataset. Applied feature selection, data balancing, and models like RF, XGBoost, and MLP, achieving robust detection across binary and multiclass tasks.

items.name: ML_AMR_Prediction_v2
items.description: An alignment-free, Out-of-Core Machine Learning framework for Antimicrobial Resistance (AMR) prediction directly from WGS data, featuring Nextflow validation.

items.name: gomlx
items.description: GoMLX: An Accelerated Machine Learning Framework For Go

items.name: PreRisk-CoV2
items.description: Pre-exposure risk assessment for SARS-CoV-2 using Serum protein biomarkers. Machine learning framework (KNN+GA) with 7-protein panel.

items.name: Controlled-Condition-Path-Probing
items.description: This project presents a novel black-box auditing framework designed to detect backdoors in text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models, specifically tailored for Machine Learning as a Service (MLaaS) platforms.

items.name: heat
items.description: Distributed tensors and Machine Learning framework with GPU and MPI acceleration in Python

items.name: IFRS-9-Expected-Credit-Loss-ECL-Modeling-using-Advanced-Machine-Learning
items.description: This project develops a predictive framework for credit risk under IFRS 9 standards. It leverages a dataset of over 32,500 entries to predict the Probability of Default (PD).

items.name: DistroML
items.description: DistroML is an enterprise-grade distributed machine learning training framework designed to accelerate deep learning workflows across multiple GPUs, nodes, and cloud environments.

items.name: AI-Model-Hub
items.description: AI-Model-Hub is a comprehensive repository that aggregates a wide range of AI models, machine learning frameworks, and practical resources. The goal is to provide a centralized platform where developers and researchers can بسهولة discover, experiment with, and integrate cutting-edge AI solutions into real-world applications while staying organized

items.name: ECIF-KINASE-AFFINITY-PREDICTOR
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting kinase–ligand binding affinities using ECIF and RDKit descriptors. This repository includes workflows for feature generation, model training, validation, external predictions, and consensus-based prioritization of high-confidence kinase-binding compounds for virtual screening applications

items.name: Heart-Disease-Prediction-Model
items.description: This project is a Machine Learning-based web application that predicts the likelihood of heart disease in a patient using medical attributes. The model is trained on healthcare data and deployed using a Flask web framework.  The goal of this project is to demonstrate how ML can assist in early detection of heart-related issues.

items.name: ML-Assisted-Performance-Prediction-and-Design-of-MOFs-for-Deep-Dehydration-of-Ethylene
items.description: Machine Learning-Assisted Performance Prediction and Design of Metal-Organic Frameworks for Deep Dehydration of Ethylene

items.name: CuraMind-AI-Intelligent-Health-Prediction-Recommendation-System
items.description: machine learning-based healthcare recommendation system that predicts diseases from user symptoms and provides personalized medication, diet, and fitness guidance. Technologies Used:  Backend: Python (Flask Framework) Frontend: HTML, CSS, and Jinja2 templates for dynamic web pages Machine Learning

items.description: A Leakage-Aware, Clinically Constrained Machine Learning Framework for Multi-Class Cardiovascular Phenotyping from EHR Data

items.name: agentsciml
items.description: Multi-agent evolutionary framework for automated scientific machine learning discovery

items.name: smart-energy-forecasting-apedss
items.description: APEDSS: an explainable and decision-centric framework for renewable energy forecasting, counterfactual analysis, and IoT-enabled energy management using machine learning, LIME, and policy-based decision support.

items.name: IoT-496-C-ML-Framework
items.description: Machine Learning library in C and Python to create and run custom network intrusion models on a Raspberry Pi Pico 2W

items.description: This notebook demonstrates how to efficiently perform hyperparameter optimization using Optuna, a powerful and flexible framework for automated machine learning optimization. The goal is to improve model performance by systematically searching for the best combination of hyperparameters.

items.name: GradCore-Tensor
items.description: Machine Learning framework built from scratch in CPP.

items.name: Thesis-
items.description: MATLAB-based framework integrating structural analysis and machine learning for damage severity classification in 2D frame systems. Damage is modeled via stiffness degradation, with synthetic response data used to train predictive models. (Ongoing work)

items.name: Interpretable-ML-for-Multi-Hazard-assessment-
items.description: A machine learning framework using a Random Forest classifier to assest and map disaster  damage from satellite imagery.

items.name: HCC-SPML-Hepatocellular-Carcinoma-Survival-Prediction-via-Machine-Learning
items.description: HCC-SPML: Multi-task ML framework for HCC post-surgical survival prediction — binary mortality classification and 2-year survival analysis. Published at CICET 2025.

items.name: Lab-Amb-organic-hygroscopicity-estimation
items.description: In this study, we developed a laboratory-anchored, machine-learning framework to quantitatively link organic aerosol hygroscopicity from single-compound measurements to ambient aerosol κ.

items.name: CoinageClusterML
items.description: Machine Learning framework for predicting binding energies and magic numbers in Cu, Ag, and Au nanoclusters (N ≤ 55) using the Open Quantum Cluster Database (OQCD). Features 7 ensemble models, SHAP interpretability, and 9 geometric descriptors.

items.name: ShortKit-ML
items.description: A unified framework to detect, benchmark, and mitigate shortcut learning in machine learning   models across medical imaging and beyond.

items.name: Projeto-Ataques-de-Inferencia-Machine-Learning
items.description: Framework experimental para analisar o trade-off entre Privacidade Diferencial, utilidade dos dados e risco de vazamento. Avalia o impacto de diferentes valores de ε usando modelos simples de ML e ataques de inferência. Consome datasets já privatizados por pipeline externo.

items.name: GeoAI-InSAR-Subsidence-Forecasting
items.description: A machine learning framework for large-scale land subsidence forecasting using Sentinel-1 InSAR time-series, ERA5-Land climate reanalysis, and SoilGrids data across 8 strategic regions in Iran.

items.name: Agentic_AI-finrobot_machine_learning
items.description: A multi-agent financial analysis framework leveraging LLM-powered agents for macroeconomic insights, company evaluation, and portfolio decision-making. Features a three-layer architecture, API-integrated data pipelines, and an interactive Streamlit frontend.

items.name: mobiml
items.description: Framework for machine learning from movement data

items.name: wind-energy-forecasting-hybrid-models
items.description: A multi-model wind energy forecasting framework combining aerodynamic (ADM, BEM), time-series (AR, MA, ARMA), and machine learning/deep learning models, achieving high-accuracy power prediction and deployed via an interactive Streamlit application.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Assisted-Screening-of-Cyano-Enriched-Additives
items.description: The Battery Candidate Discovery Pipeline is a high-performance cheminformatics framework designed to accelerate the discovery of functional electrolyte additives. The pipeline automates the transition from raw SMILES strings to ranked, clustered, and visualized candidates, utilizing advanced molecular descriptors and unsupervised machine learning.

items.name: GPR
items.description: Graph-informed Gaussian Process Regression framework for leak detection in water distribution networks. The method reconstructs spatio-temporal pressure fields from sparse data, enabling physics-aware leak localization and parameter estimation using interpretable kernels and machine learning models.

items.name: BCFL-Healthcare-Model-Sharing
items.description: The primary objective  is to develop a decentralized collaboration, privacy-preserving machine learning framework for the healthcare sector to enable multiple medical institutions to train a global AI model without even sharing raw patient data.

items.name: FW_XFL
items.description: The XFL Framework is a software platform that enables the configuration of experimentation parameters, the selection of measurement metrics, the deployment, and the visualization of results of a distributed machine learning algorithm (XFL) on real hardware nodes.

items.name: ARTIST
items.description: A differentiable ray tracer using the PyTorch machine-learning framework in Python.

items.name: QRC-Volatility-Forecasting
items.description: A Python framework for volatility forecasting using Quantum Reservoir Computing (Qiskit) and GARCH (Arch). Benchmarks quantum machine learning against econometric baselines on S&P 500 data.

items.name: ml-model-trainer
items.description: ML Model Trainer – A Python-based framework for training, evaluating, and deploying machine learning models. Supports custom datasets, automated preprocessing, model selection, and export to formats like TensorFlow Lite or PyTorch. Ideal for beginners and developers building production-ready ML pipelines.

items.name: TNBC_modelling
items.description: An Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Identifying Potential Inhibitors in Triple-Negative Breast Cancer

items.name: MLJ.jl

items.description: This thesis develops a multi-stage framework for detecting, ranking, and visualising money laundering activity on the Bitcoin blockchain using machine learning and network analysis of the Elliptic++ dataset.

items.description: A flexible and modular machine learning framework designed to support leakage-free model training through custom cross-validation fold construction

items.name: NRLMF-DTI-MurrayaBAT
items.description: NRLMF-DTI-MurrayaBAT is a drug–target interaction framework that applies NRLMF-based negative inference to address data imbalance and employs supervised machine learning to predict interactions between Murraya paniculata bioactive compounds and brown adipose tissue–associated proteins in obesity-related conditions.

items.name: predicting-engagement-success-ml
items.description: Machine learning project that predicts social media engagement success using early persuasion signals, influencer authority, and algorithmic amplification in a two-stage framework.

items.name: OmniRank
items.description: A comprehensive ranking and evaluation framework for machine learning models and algorithms

items.name: Dual-Head-GNN-with-Adaptive-RL-Framework-for-FDIA-on-IIOT
items.description: Research work on False data injection attacks on Cyber Physical Systems using deep learning approaches. Novel Aprroach of Inter- and Intra machine based graph using spatio temporal model with Multi-Head Attention and used optimized Deep Q-Networks thershold.

items.name: leaf-disease-framework
items.description: A Machine Learning framework for detecting plant leaf diseases and providing agricultural treatment recommendations.

items.name: Neuro-Symbolic-AI-for-Automated-Cyber-Threat-Intelligence-Generation
items.description: Neuro-Symbolic AI framework for automated cyber threat intelligence generation using hybrid reasoning, machine learning, and knowledge graphs.

items.name: A-MACHINE-LEARNING-POWERED-FOR-PREDICTIVE-SOIL-ANALYSIS-AND-SMART-FERTILIZER-RECOMMENDATION
items.description: A MACHINE LEARNING-POWERED FRAMEWORK FOR PREDICTIVE SOIL ANALYSIS AND SMART FERTILIZER RECOMMENDATION

items.name: low-k-high-E
items.description: Physics-constrained multi-task machine learning framework for the concurrent prediction of dielectric constant (k) and Young’s modulus (E) of low-k materials.

items.name: PhosBind
items.description: PhosBind is a machine learning framework that leverages ESM2 protein embeddings to predict and classify anion-binding sites, with a focus on phosphate recognition. It enables data-driven insights into protein–anion interactions for applications in biomolecular design and nutrient recovery.

items.name: ML-Project
items.description: Developed within the framework of the Machine Learning curriculum at Ben-Gurion University, this project translates theoretical algorithmic concepts into a practical, end-to-end data processing pipeline.

items.name: classical-optimization
items.description: Implementing a diverse range of classical machine learning and optimization without frameworks.

items.name: Chonky
items.description: A text-processing framework for machine-learning workflows based in python

items.name: MultiScaleArrays.jl
items.description: A framework for developing multi-scale arrays for use in scientific machine learning (SciML) simulations

items.name: Border-Guard-AI
items.description: BorderGuard AI is a multi-modal security framework designed to protect critical border infrastructure. It combines Unsupervised Machine Learning for sensor anomaly detection with Computer Vision for real-time surveillance monitoring.

items.name: Sake
items.description: A modular machine learning framework for budget execution & data analysis built in Python with Scikit, XGBoost, PyTorch, and TensorFlow.

items.name: Cognitive-Workload-Detection-System
items.description: A Real-Time Non-Intrusive Behavioral Framework  for Cognitive Workload Awareness Using Machine Learning on Mouse and Keyboard Dynamics

items.name: The-AI-Pavilion
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework designed to quantify T20 cricket dynamics. This project leverages a multi-model ensemble approach to forecast the 2026 season, achieving a 0.71 AUC score by integrating squad strength, venue advantage, and real-time team form.

items.name: Positive-Unlabeled-Prediction-Framework-for-Molecular-Synthesizability
items.description: PU prediction framework composed of traditional machine learning models and deep learning models

items.name: pfund
items.description: An All-in-One Algo-Trading Framework: Backtest -> Train -> Trade -> Monitor. Machine / Deep Learning Ready. Supports All Trading: TradFi+CeFi+DeFi. Code Once, Trade Anywhere.

items.name: scratch-to-llm
items.description: Learn AI and machine learning from scratch with Python — pure math to neural networks to LLM API in one Jupyter notebook. No frameworks, no black boxes. Built for absolute beginners.

items.name: ML-Framework-Evolution
items.description: This project is part of an Introduction to Machine Learning course, focusing on an end-to-end ML workflow through a Kaggle competition. It covers the full pipeline from Exploratory Data Analysis and feature engineering to model development and evaluation, implemented across multiple frameworks.
